data.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In VKTX Options
Canadian Solar Margins Shrink In Q3, Stock Slides
data.description: Canadian Solar Inc. (CSIQ) reported lower Q3 2024 results and missed expectations. Revenue declined 18%, gross margin down 20%, EPS at $(0.31). Cash position of $2.8B.

data.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev Says Sports Betting Comments Taken 'A Little Bit Out Of Context,' But He Also 'Wouldn't Rule It Out'
data.description: Robinhood Markets saw early success with the launch of event contracts ahead of the 2024 presidential election. Now the company appears to be eyeing the sports betting space.

data.title: CG Oncology Touts Encouraging Data From Late-Stage Study Of Bladder Cancer Candidate
data.description: CG Oncology's BOND-003 trial reveals durable efficacy of cretostimogene in NMIBC patients, with median DOR exceeding 27 months and no severe side effects.
